title: tephrosia natalensis subsp. natalensis
intro: Tephrosia natalensis subsp. natalensis, also known as Natal bird's eye or Natal tephrosia, is a shrub-like plant native to South Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of this plant include the treatment of various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin problems, as well as its use as an antiseptic and antispasmodic agent. Tephrosia natalensis subsp. natalensis is often prepared as a tea or infusion for its medicinal purposes, and can also be used in herbal preparations such as tinctures and decoctions.
